document.source_title: IPL 2026 PBKS vs RCB | Venkatesh, Bhuvneshwar do the star turn as RCB seals playoff spot

claims.claim_text: Royal Challengers Bangalore won the match against Punjab Kings.
claims.evidence_text: Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s early strikes had rendered enough damage on Punjab Kings to seal Royal Challengers Bengaluru’s 23-run win in IPL 2026.

entities.name: Royal Challengers Bangalore
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Bangalore, India.
entities.evidence_text: Royal Challengers Bangalore bowler Bhuvneshwar Kumar celebrates the wicket of Priyansh Arya.

entities.name: Punjab Kings
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Mohali, Punjab, India.
entities.evidence_text: Shashank Singh attempted a late recovery, but Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s early strikes had rendered enough damage on Punjab Kings.

entities.name: Bhuvneshwar Kumar
entities.description: An Indian cricketer who plays for Royal Challengers Bangalore.
entities.evidence_text: Bhuvneshwar Kumar celebrates the wicket of Priyansh Arya.

entities.name: Venkatesh Iyer
entities.description: An Indian cricketer who plays for Royal Challengers Bangalore.
entities.evidence_text: Venkatesh Iyer lapped up a rare opportunity to notch up an IPL fifty after a year.

entities.name: Virat Kohli
entities.description: An Indian cricketer and former captain of the Indian national team.
entities.evidence_text: Kohli spelled out his intent with a loft over covers off Ozmatullah Omarzai.

events.event: IPL Match between RCB and PBKS
events.evidence_text: Royal Challengers Bangalore bowler Bhuvneshwar Kumar celebrates the wicket of Priyansh Arya during the IPL T20 Match at HPCA Stadium in Dharamshala.

metrics.name: RCB Score
metrics.evidence_text: Venkatesh targeted the on-side to finish unbeaten on 73 (40b, 8x4, 4x6).

metrics.name: PBKS Score
metrics.evidence_text: Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s early strikes had rendered enough damage on Punjab Kings to seal Royal Challengers Bengaluru’s 23-run win.
